vocab.meaning: ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh rộng lớn
vocab.example: We hiked to the peak just before dawn to behold the panorama of the sleeping city below.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển gồ ghề, đá lởm chởm
vocab.example: The most unforgettable view I've encountered was the rugged coastline of Ireland, where massive cliffs meet the Atlantic.

vocab.meaning: những thung lũng xanh tươi mỡ màng
vocab.example: Looking down from the cable car, I saw an endless stretch of verdant valleys dotted with small farmhouses.

vocab.meaning: vùng nước trong suốt như pha lê
vocab.example: The island was surrounded by crystalline waters that shifted through every imaginable shade of blue.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác bình yên, tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: The mountain lake was so still that it created a profound sense of serenity that I still recall vividly.

vocab.meaning: những đỉnh núi phủ tuyết trắng
vocab.example: The sunrise hitting the snow-capped peaks turned the entire mountain range into a brilliant shade of pink.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (cảnh tượng cực kỳ đẹp)
vocab.example: The autumn forest was a true visual feast, with leaves transitioning from vibrant gold to deep crimson.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị che khuất
vocab.example: From the observation deck, we had a completely unobstructed view of the horizon where the sea meets the sky.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh hùng vĩ, uy nghiêm
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the majestic landscape in the Grand Canyon makes you realize how small we truly are.

vocab.meaning: điều kiện khí quyển (sương mù, mây, ánh sáng...)
vocab.example: Due to the unique atmospheric conditions that morning, the valley was shrouded in a mystical, swirling mist.
